items.title: No cartels involved - but Mexico's pyramid attack prompts new concerns
items.dek: The deadly shooting at a popular tourist site weeks before the World Cup has rocked Mexico.
items.body: The deadly shooting at a popular tourist site weeks before the World Cup has rocked Mexico.

items.title: Los Angeles becomes first major US school district to limit classroom screen time
items.dek: The school district, which serves about half a million students, is looking to reduce its reliance on devices after the pandemic.

items.title: 12 straight ... and counting? The numbers behind the Mets' stunning losing streak
items.dek: Here's what has gone wrong for New York -- and whether it's already time to say goodbye to October.
